titleStmt.title: SII 8.254: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 254. (A.R. No. 649 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . makāmaṇṭalīcura Arirāyavipāṭa pāṣaikkuttappum Irāyarakaṇṭa mūvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ
śrīvīraAriyaṇaUṭaiyar kumāraṉ śrīvīraviruppaṇṇaUṭaiyar pṛthivirācciyam paṇṇiAruḷā
niṉṟa cakābtaM 1000 3 100 mel cellāniṉṟa śrīmukavaruṣattu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu cetta
miyum peṟṟa nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai nāḷ Irāceṉtiracoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭutirukkaḷar
Uṭaiyār AṭaiṉtārkkuAruḷceyta nāyaṉār koyili perummaṭa
ttu mutalikaḷum taṉimāyecurarum Uḷḷuril nilaimāyecurarum kaikkoḷamutalikaḷum nimaṉtakkāṟa
rum Ellorum niṟaivaṟa niṟaiṉtuk kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi karuṇākaraṉ tirumaṇṭapattiliruntu ce
yaciṅkakulakālavaḷanāṭṭut tāṉavanāṭṭuk kaṇṭiūrilk kāṇiyuṭaiya Āṇṭārkaḷil
maṇṇakamuṭaiyāṉ vaḷattāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ muṉṉāḷ piṟacāpativaruṣam
kiṣāmattile Ikkoyilukku mutalum Iṉṟip pūcaiyum cūṉiyamāy tiruppaṇiyum Iṉṟi pa
rikaramum kulaintupokaiyil Innāḷile Ittirunaṭṭapperumāḷ taṉṉuṭaiya mutali
le nāṉūṟu paṇamum Iṭṭup pūcaiyum tiruppaṇiyum naṭattip parikaramum cettuk kuṭiyum Amatti
p payirum ceyvittu naṭattippotukaiyil Uṭaiyār Aṭaiṉtārkku Aruḷceyta nāyaṉār tiruvāymalar
ntaruḷi caṇṭecurat tirumukam kuṭuttaruḷiṉa māṭāpattiyam Uṭkaṇkāṇi Irāciyam Eḻuttu Ilacci
ṉai Ivaiyum kuṭuttu Ivaṉukku kuṭutta maṉai Āvatu cannatitteruvil teṟkupārttu muṭinta maṉai
yum Inta maṉaik kurittāna puḻaikkaṭai teṟkuOṭai Aḷavum Itil meṉokkina maramum ki
ḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eṟppiyarpaṭṭa camuṟtap piṟāttiyum cantiṟātittavarai
yum kāṇiyāṭciyākap peṟakkaṭavaṉākavum Intak kāṇiyāṭci Ivaṉukku dā
ṉādamana viṟṟu Oṟṟik kiṟaiyaṅkaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum . Ippaṭikku nāyaṉār
AṭaintārkkuAruḷceytanāyaṉār tiruvāymalarntaruḷi caṇṭecurar tirumukam kuṭuttaruḷittu .
Digital edition of SII 8.254 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
